rationale: The citing paper’s core construct is geocompetition/relative proximity as a moderator of ad effectiveness, while the cited paper’s core contribution is causal evidence on competitive locational targeting (geo-conquesting) beyond own-store proximity—an obvious conceptual overlap in competitive spatial targeting. This makes the cited work a plausible mechanism/foundation/comparison source rather than a clearly incidental mention. Given only DOI-level matched evidence and no in-text snippet, it is not safe to drop as mention-only.
